zh.Ollerton, Nottinghamshire, England, Unit: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾奧勒頓
zh.Knutsford, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾可努恰福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Grosvenor於1521年出生在英國素福爾可萊塔姆時，她的父親Richard Grosvenor14歲，母親Lady Katherine Dutton15歲。她於大約1538年與Randall Baguley在英國英格蘭素福爾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1568年在英國素福爾可享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾奧勒頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Grosvenor于1521年出生在英国素福爾可萊塔姆时，她的父亲Richard Grosvenor14岁，母亲Lady Katherine Dutton15岁。她于大约1538年与Randall Baguley在英国英格兰素福爾可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1568年在英国素福爾可享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾奧勒頓。

nameMeanings.name: Grosvenor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from French gros ‘big, great’ + veneur ‘hunter’.

History: This is the name of one of the wealthiest families in Britain, which holds the title Duke of Westminster. They have been long established in Cheshire, with strong links with the city of Chester. One of the earliest recorded bearers of the name was Robert le Grosvenor of Budworth, who was granted lands by the Earl of Chester in 1160. The family's fortunes were founded by Thomas Grosvenor (born 1656), who in 1677 married an heiress, Mary Davies, whose inheritance included Ebury Farm, Middlesex. This now forms an area of central London that includes Grosvenor Square and Belgrave Square.

variants.name: Gravenor
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French grand ‘big, tall’ + veneor ‘hunter’. Compare Grosvenor .

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Grosvenor was born in 1521, in Wrentham, Suffolk, England, her father, Richard Grosvenor, was 14 and her mother, Lady Katherine Dutton, was 15. She married Randall Baguley about 1538, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1568, in Suffolk, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Ollerton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Grosvenor est née en 1521, à Wrentham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Richard Grosvenor, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Lady Katherine Dutton, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Randall Baguley environ 1538, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1568, à Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à Ollerton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Grosvenor 1521 in Wrentham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Grosvenor 14 und ihre Mutter Lady Katherine Dutton 15. Sie hat um 1538 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Randall Baguley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1568 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Suffolk, England und wurde in Ollerton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Grosvenor è nata il nel 1521 nel Wrentham, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Richard Grosvenor, aveva 14 anni e sua madre, Lady Katherine Dutton, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Randall Baguley circa 1538, nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1568, nel Suffolk, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolta a Ollerton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Grosvenorが1521年にイギリススフォルクウレンサムで生まれた時，父Richard Grosvenorは14歳，母Lady Katherine Duttonは15歳であった。約1538年にイギリスイギリススフォルクでRandall Baguleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1568年にイギリススフォルクで47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアオラートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Grosvenor(이)가 1521년 영국 수폴크 렌섬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Grosvenor(은)는 14세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Katherine Dutton(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 대략 1538년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 Randall Baguley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1568년 영국 수폴크에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 레르턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Grosvenor nasceu em 1521, em Wrentham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Grosvenor, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Lady Katherine Dutton, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Randall Baguley aproximadamente 1538, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1568, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultada em Ollerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Grosvenor родилась в 1521 г. в местности рентам, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Grosvenor было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Katherine Dutton, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Randall Baguley около 1538 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1568 г. в местности суффолк, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности оллиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor Grosvenor nació en 1521, en Wrentham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Grosvenor, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Lady Katherine Dutton, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Randall Baguley aproximadamente 1538, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1568, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultada en Ollerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
